title: El piyayo
writer: José Luis Colina, Vicente Llosa, Luis Lucia
actors: Valeriano León, Manuel Luna, Jesús Tordesillas
plot: El Piyayo, Andalusian through and through, is a gypsy lover of tradition, abundant in grace and with a spirit that overflows with honesty. He tours Malaga desperately looking to make some money, with blind faith in the Divine Prov...
